channel.title: Haines City, FL - Pages
channel.description: Haines City, FL - Get the latest alerts

item.title: Learn to Swim
item.description: Information about Learn-to-Swim Swim Lessons.

item.title: Adult Programs
item.description: Programs are available to all adults ages 18 and up at no cost. Participation in encouraged on a weekly basis in order to network with other participants and become fluent in the said craft or activity.

item.title: Community Outreach
item.description: Community outreach programs

item.title: Cultural Arts
item.description: Find out what kinds of programs are available through the parks and recreation program.

item.title: Athletics
item.description: Find out what kinds of activities are available to adult citizens in our community.

item.title: Other Lessons
item.description: Information about Adult Swim Classes, SNAP classes, and Private Swim Lessons

item.title: Preschool
item.description: Information about Preschool Swim Lessons.

item.title: Programs
item.description: Information about aquatics programs and swim teams.

item.title: Easter Egg Hunt
item.description: Haines City’s annual Easter Egg Hunt will be held Saturday, March 31, 2018, at 10 a.m. at the Larry Parrish Baseball Complex.

item.title: Parent & Child
item.description: Information about Parent and Child Swim Lessons

item.title: Swim Lessons
item.description: Learn about the 2018 swim lesson information.

item.title: Police Department
item.description: The Haines City Police Department is responsible for enforcing the laws of the State of Florida and the Code of Ordinances of Haines City.

item.title: Election Information Center
item.description: This information is intended to familiarize City Commission Candidates, Campaign treasurers, and Residents with the duties and responsibilities required under Florida’s Election Laws, and the Haines City Charter.

item.title: Available Positions
item.description: View available positions within the Haines City Boards and Committees.

item.title: Indoor Water Conservation Programs
item.description: Learn about the different types of indoor water conservation programs, including watersense toilets and water conservation kits.

item.title: Utilities Department
item.description: The Utilities Department is responsible for protecting and safeguarding the public’s health, welfare and safety by properly operating and maintaining the City’s water and wastewater infrastructure in an efficient manner while protecting the City’s natural resources.

item.title: Training
item.description: Information regarding American Red Cross training classes for CPR, Lifeguarding, etc.

item.title: Aquatics
item.description: Learn about the rates, open swim information and season passes.

item.title: City Manager's Office
item.description: The City Manager is the Chief Administrative Officer (CAO) for the municipal entity.

item.title: Fire Department
item.description: The Haines City Fire Department protects a community of approximately 25,000 residents living in an approximately 19.8 square-mile area within the City limits of Haines City.

item.title: What is a CRA?
item.description: What is a CRA?

item.title: Employee Pension & Retirement
item.description: View documents for general employees, police officers and firefighters retirement plans.

item.title: Property Taxes & Assessments
item.description: View information about City property tax rates and assessment rates.

item.title: Ribs on the Ridge
item.description: Haines City’s 15th annual BBQ competition sanctioned by Florida BBQ Association will be held on February 18, 2023 from 10 a.m. to 9 p.m.

item.title: Ironman 70.3 Florida
item.description: This page will has information for the upcoming IRONMAN 70.3 Florida triathlon held at Lake Eva Park.

item.title: Fall Break Camp
item.description: Information on our three day camp for kids that need a place to go while school is out over the Thanksgiving Holiday break.

item.title: Spring Break Camp
item.description: Information on our five day camp for kids that need a place to go while school is out over the Spring break week.

item.title: Communications & Marketing
item.description: Communications and Marketing Division of the City Manager's Office

item.title: Smart Meter Replacement Project
item.description: This page will host information concerning the meter replacement project
